name: CalamityShield Basic
description: Cash payout after a declared typhoon or flood event in the insured municipality. Covers emergency expenses and income bridge.

name: CalamityShield Plus
description: Higher calamity payout tier with faster parametric trigger on PAGASA storm signals.

name: AniSecure Rice Cover
description: Indemnifies crop loss from typhoon, flood, pests, or drought for one cropping season. Modelled on PCIC-style cover.

name: HuliSecure Fisher Cover
description: Income-shock protection for fishing households: payout when storm closures or gear loss interrupt catch income.

name: Family Term Micro-Life
description: Term life cover paying a lump sum to dependents. Includes a small funeral benefit rider.

name: Family Term Micro-Life Plus
description: Higher life cover tier for households with several dependents.

name: Hospital Cash Micro-Health
description: Fixed cash benefit per hospital day plus outpatient allowance, designed to top up PhilHealth.

name: Hospital Cash Lite
description: Entry-tier hospital cash benefit for thin-margin households.

name: Bahay & Negosyo Property Cover
description: Covers dwelling and small-business assets (store stock, tricycle, boat motor) against storm, flood, and fire damage.

name: Personal Accident Micro
description: Accidental death and disablement benefit with daily income support during recovery.
